# Security Checklist: Cache Frequently Requested Computations

**Purpose**: Validate safe cache fallback behavior.
**Created**: 2026-03-11
**Feature**: `specs/029-cache-computations/spec.md`

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/prompts:speckit.checklist` workflow.

## Error Handling

- [x] CHK-SEC-001 Cache outages do not block estimate responses.
- [x] CHK-SEC-002 Corrupted cache entries are invalidated and recomputed.

## Traceability

- [x] CHK-SEC-003 Cache hit/miss metrics are logged.
